message:
fix: Escape Zig keywords in defer statements

Python variables named `error`, `test`, `type`, etc. would cause
compilation failures when used in defer statements like:
  defer allocator.free(error)  // Zig keyword!

Now use zig_keywords.writeLocalVarName() to properly escape:
  defer allocator.free(@"error")

Long-term fix: Apply keyword escaping consistently in all defer
emission functions (emitStringConcatDefer, emitArrayListDefer,
emitListCompDefer, emitDictDefer, emitAllocatedStringDefer).
